description: Triggers for continuous product discovery: interviews, OSTs, assumption testing

queries.query: Help me set up a weekly discovery rhythm for our product trio
Build an Opportunity Solution Tree for our 30-day retention outcome
Create an interview snapshot from the notes I took in this customer call
Design an assumption test for this solution we want to build
Generate 5 solution approaches for this customer opportunity we've validated
What's the thin-slice MVP for testing this onboarding solution hypothesis?
Create an interview guide to understand why users churn in week 1
Synthesize patterns across these 8 interview snapshots I've collected
Help me design an Opportunity Council meeting with this week's discovery findings
I'm framing these opportunities as solutions — help me reframe as problems
Design a staged rollout plan for our new feature
Build a bet backlog and roadmap for next quarter
Run a bet retrospective — scale, iterate, or kill?
Create a 1-page product strategy canvas
Coach a struggling PM on executive communication
Define ICP and anti-ICP for our B2B product
Build an agency-control tradeoff for our AI agent feature
Create a GTM plan for our feature launch
Design operating rhythm for a VP of Product organization
Set up a portfolio review process across our product lines
